patches.source: Establishment Time and Development Starting Point BOFA was established on December 1995, and it is a comprehensive enterprise focusing on international engineering in the equipment manufacturing industry. Core Business Areas Its portfolio with Engineering Design, Engineering Contractor, Equipment Manufacture, International
patches.translation:
Establishment Time and Development
Starting Point
BOFA was established on December 1995, and it is a
comprehensive enterprise focusing on international
engineering in the equipment manufacturing industry.
Core Business Areas
Its portfolio with Engineering Design, Engineering
Contractor, Equipment Manufacture, International

patches.source: Trade, Commercial Services, Culture and Tourism and Financial Services. Four Core Subsidiary Groups It has four core subsidiary groups: Power Station Equipment Group, Cultural Industry Group, International Trade Group, and Financial Investment Group, forming a diversified development pattern.
patches.translation:
Trade, Commercial Services, Culture and Tourism
and Financial Services.
Four Core Subsidiary Groups
It has four core subsidiary groups: Power Station
Equipment Group, Cultural Industry Group, International
Trade Group, and Financial Investment Group, forming
a diversified development pattern.

patches.source: Distributionof OverseasSubsidiaries Distribution of Overseas Subsidiaries BOFA has 5 overseas subsidiaries, actively expanding the international market and helping the Group realize its global operation strategy.

patches.source: Advantages of Global Operation Structure The collaborative operation of domestic and overseas subsidiaries forms an efficient global layout, laying an important foundation for the Group to participate in international projects and expand overseas business. internationalprojects and expand overseas business.

patches.source: Global Market Coverage: The projects are spread across more than 30 countries and regions in Asia, Africa, and South Global Market Coverage: The projects are spread across more than30 countries and regions in Asia, Africa, and South America, with contracted contract value exceeding 15 billion US dollars. It has successively constructed multiple coal-fired power stations, gas-fired power stations (combined cycle), hydropower stations, waste incineration and new energy power generation projects (photovoltaic power generation, wind power generation and energy storage). ennsy o pn o gg)sd ogen
